description:
Zixi is the industry leader for enabling dependable, live broadcast-quality video over any IP network, any protocol, any cloud and any edge device. In this episode, Head of Product, Tim Baldwin, and SA Lana Kalashnyk explore the solutions architecture driving Zixi's Software-Defined Video Platform offers cloud-based technologies for broadcasters, enterprises, over-the-top video providers, and mobile service providers around the world. Services used are Amazon EC2, Amazon DynamoDB, Amazon RDS and AWS Media Services like AWS Elemental Live and AWS Elemental MediaConnect that make up Zixi's data plane. 

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: Zixi: Managing In-Field Media Encoders with the Zen Master Control Plane
